name: io.github.hypeprinter007-stack/anchor-x402
description: 14-tool x402 MCP: 9 onchain primitives + 5 LLM endpoints. USDC pay-per-call on Base or Solana.

environmentVariables.name: ANCHOR_WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: EVM private key (0x-prefixed hex). The wallet pays for x402 calls in USDC on Base mainnet. Fund with USDC before use.
